title: buildah from *-archive:PATH - inconsistent container names
body:
...depending on whether PATH has a slash in it or not:
```console
[setup]
# buildah pull --quiet alpine
# buildah push --quiet alpine oci-archive:/tmp/foo.tar
# buildah push --quiet alpine oci-archive:foo.tar

[symptom]
# buildah from --quiet oci-archive:foo.tar      <<< in cwd
oci-archive-working-container                   <<< base is 'oci-archive'
# buildah from --quiet oci-archive:./foo.tar    <<< in cwd, with slash in path
foo.tar-working-container                       <<< base is now 'foo.tar'
# buildah from --quiet oci-archive:/tmp/foo.tar
foo.tar-working-container-1
```
Same with `s/oci-archive/docker-archive/g`.

This is probably not a big deal; it's just unexpected. Reporting in case it's not deliberate.

buildah-1.13.0-0.1.dev.gite28c43d.fc32 and buildah-1.11.6-2.fc30

comments.body: Yes this is strange and I think should be fixed.
I believe this is fixed in current buildah, reopen if I am mistaken.
